untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (5-year earnings growth rate, YoY earnings improvement, quarterly earnings comparison) that are not available in the allowed technical indicator list. The rule depends on earnings quality and YoY earnings changes which cannot be expressed using only price/volume-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available indicators: close > support (s1) approximates 'price above prior support', and returns >= 0.0 approximates 'non-negative earnings growth' concept. However, the core earnings quality conditions ('5-year earnings growth', 'YoY earnings improvement', 'earnings collapse >30%') are fundamental metrics outside the scope of technical indicators. A complete implementation would require integration of earnings data sources. Exit condition uses returns < -0.30 to approximate earnings collapse severity.
